## docker 
```
# [https://docs.docker.com/engine/install/ubuntu/]
# Add Docker's official GPG key:
sudo apt update
sudo apt install ca-certificates curl
sudo install -m 0755 -d /etc/apt/keyrings
sudo curl -fsSL https://download.docker.com/linux/ubuntu/gpg -o /etc/apt/keyrings/docker.asc
sudo chmod a+r /etc/apt/keyrings/docker.asc

# Add the repository to Apt sources:
sudo tee /etc/apt/sources.list.d/docker.sources <<EOF
Types: deb
URIs: https://download.docker.com/linux/ubuntu
Suites: $(. /etc/os-release && echo "${UBUNTU_CODENAME:-$VERSION_CODENAME}")
Components: stable
Architectures: $(dpkg --print-architecture)
Signed-By: /etc/apt/keyrings/docker.asc
EOF

sudo apt update
sudo apt install docker-ce docker-ce-cli containerd.io docker-buildx-plugin docker-compose-plugin

sudo systemctl status docker
sudo systemctl start docker

```

## 下载酒馆 
```
git clone https://github.com/SillyTavern/SillyTavern.git -b release
```
![](https://onenote.officeapps.live.com/o/GetImage.ashx?&WOPIsrc=https%3A%2F%2Fmy%2Emicrosoftpersonalcontent%2Ecom%2Fpersonal%2Fec9fb4e16b8ab025%2F%5Fvti%5Fbin%2Fwopi%2Eashx%2Ffiles%2FEC9FB4E16B8AB025%213159&access_token=eyJhbGciOiJSUzI1NiIsImtpZCI6IkMxMDU5RTM1MkYyOUY5QUJCNzg4MjRBNkQ4MTQ5RDI2NDFDQzc5QjgiLCJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJ4NXQiOiJ3UVdlTlM4cC1hdTNpQ1NtMkJTZEprSE1lYmcifQ%%2EYMVn7SU0Vmu4YzifjPVAA4NUF%2DGrVYeivwz6r0qzHkpZVRtSgHm7oKD3wwgnVvmVKgfgrlyzHtalY29%2D4k2VFNsL5VOsmGvslCusscmrT3vpk7djBTS%5F9o717fn7JSyTPfxsKOYAys0OWq81D%2Dq7aTfNsTZClrfx5JWZJ18ROEiOgbLdqgbJE5yKsqedPsqIa6Ey2iq1yTjFdvPpXJI%5F6gz3JfStnv88yfh6gzAlMzJhyyUfanQld2ryDwV%5Fs9%5FafVkZU4cW7iuycpc%2Dtk4RLhDvxHi8jGewCNvV22EVWGf2%2DRcyMxEHvLDWVXvYYU%5FcIUvA9D6nnwLhHhA6H%5FaYIA&access_token_ttl=1779869516714&ObjectDataBlobId=%7Ba8a3126f-2315-012c-1945-f0c7174a3622%7D%7B1%7D&usid=fae2c5b9-bde5-86f4-df93-c9931e09ecd6&build=16.0.20111.41014&waccluster=PCA1&wdwacuseragent=MSWACONSync)
## 安装1Panel 
```
su root 
curl -sSL https://resource.fit2cloud.com/1panel/package/quick_start.sh -o quick_start.sh && bash quick_start.sh
```
## 1Panel中部署酒馆 

Node环境 

![](https://onenote.officeapps.live.com/o/GetImage.ashx?&WOPIsrc=https%3A%2F%2Fmy%2Emicrosoftpersonalcontent%2Ecom%2Fpersonal%2Fec9fb4e16b8ab025%2F%5Fvti%5Fbin%2Fwopi%2Eashx%2Ffiles%2FEC9FB4E16B8AB025%213159&access_token=eyJhbGciOiJSUzI1NiIsImtpZCI6IkMxMDU5RTM1MkYyOUY5QUJCNzg4MjRBNkQ4MTQ5RDI2NDFDQzc5QjgiLCJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJ4NXQiOiJ3UVdlTlM4cC1hdTNpQ1NtMkJTZEprSE1lYmcifQ%%2EYMVn7SU0Vmu4YzifjPVAA4NUF%2DGrVYeivwz6r0qzHkpZVRtSgHm7oKD3wwgnVvmVKgfgrlyzHtalY29%2D4k2VFNsL5VOsmGvslCusscmrT3vpk7djBTS%5F9o717fn7JSyTPfxsKOYAys0OWq81D%2Dq7aTfNsTZClrfx5JWZJ18ROEiOgbLdqgbJE5yKsqedPsqIa6Ey2iq1yTjFdvPpXJI%5F6gz3JfStnv88yfh6gzAlMzJhyyUfanQld2ryDwV%5Fs9%5FafVkZU4cW7iuycpc%2Dtk4RLhDvxHi8jGewCNvV22EVWGf2%2DRcyMxEHvLDWVXvYYU%5FcIUvA9D6nnwLhHhA6H%5FaYIA&access_token_ttl=1779869516714&ObjectDataBlobId=%7B415f3c38-a88a-0a63-253e-1bdc2a20f38f%7D%7B1%7D&usid=fae2c5b9-bde5-86f4-df93-c9931e09ecd6&build=16.0.20111.41014&waccluster=PCA1&wdwacuseragent=MSWACONSync)

改酒馆配置文件 
>将 `listen: false` 更改为 `listen: true`
>将 `whitelistMode`: true 更改为 `whitelistMode`: false
>将 `basicAuthMode`: false 更改为 `basicAuthMode`: true
>在 `basicAuthUser` 中，设置 `username(用户名)` 和 `password(密码)`，注意要用英文的双引号包裹
## 重启Node服务

## 备份酒馆数据

[https://console.bitiful.com/users](https://console.bitiful.com/users)

## API反代 
分体gcli2api-Render版 
![](https://onenote.officeapps.live.com/o/GetImage.ashx?&WOPIsrc=https%3A%2F%2Fmy%2Emicrosoftpersonalcontent%2Ecom%2Fpersonal%2Fec9fb4e16b8ab025%2F%5Fvti%5Fbin%2Fwopi%2Eashx%2Ffiles%2FEC9FB4E16B8AB025%213159&access_token=eyJhbGciOiJSUzI1NiIsImtpZCI6IkMxMDU5RTM1MkYyOUY5QUJCNzg4MjRBNkQ4MTQ5RDI2NDFDQzc5QjgiLCJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJ4NXQiOiJ3UVdlTlM4cC1hdTNpQ1NtMkJTZEprSE1lYmcifQ%%2EYMVn7SU0Vmu4YzifjPVAA4NUF%2DGrVYeivwz6r0qzHkpZVRtSgHm7oKD3wwgnVvmVKgfgrlyzHtalY29%2D4k2VFNsL5VOsmGvslCusscmrT3vpk7djBTS%5F9o717fn7JSyTPfxsKOYAys0OWq81D%2Dq7aTfNsTZClrfx5JWZJ18ROEiOgbLdqgbJE5yKsqedPsqIa6Ey2iq1yTjFdvPpXJI%5F6gz3JfStnv88yfh6gzAlMzJhyyUfanQld2ryDwV%5Fs9%5FafVkZU4cW7iuycpc%2Dtk4RLhDvxHi8jGewCNvV22EVWGf2%2DRcyMxEHvLDWVXvYYU%5FcIUvA9D6nnwLhHhA6H%5FaYIA&access_token_ttl=1779869516714&ObjectDataBlobId=%7Bd1eba568-5928-0ffe-1c0e-0617e9dc700b%7D%7B1%7D&usid=fae2c5b9-bde5-86f4-df93-c9931e09ecd6&build=16.0.20111.41014&waccluster=PCA1&wdwacuseragent=MSWACONSync)

注册neno数据 
为什么需要数据库？ 
因为Render本身无法持久化存储数据，当gcli2api项目重启或者更新时，你的凭证将会丢失。 
但如果配置了数据库，重启或更新gcli2api项目重启时，数据就不会丢失啦。 
![](https://onenote.officeapps.live.com/o/GetImage.ashx?&WOPIsrc=https%3A%2F%2Fmy%2Emicrosoftpersonalcontent%2Ecom%2Fpersonal%2Fec9fb4e16b8ab025%2F%5Fvti%5Fbin%2Fwopi%2Eashx%2Ffiles%2FEC9FB4E16B8AB025%213159&access_token=eyJhbGciOiJSUzI1NiIsImtpZCI6IkMxMDU5RTM1MkYyOUY5QUJCNzg4MjRBNkQ4MTQ5RDI2NDFDQzc5QjgiLCJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJ4NXQiOiJ3UVdlTlM4cC1hdTNpQ1NtMkJTZEprSE1lYmcifQ%%2EYMVn7SU0Vmu4YzifjPVAA4NUF%2DGrVYeivwz6r0qzHkpZVRtSgHm7oKD3wwgnVvmVKgfgrlyzHtalY29%2D4k2VFNsL5VOsmGvslCusscmrT3vpk7djBTS%5F9o717fn7JSyTPfxsKOYAys0OWq81D%2Dq7aTfNsTZClrfx5JWZJ18ROEiOgbLdqgbJE5yKsqedPsqIa6Ey2iq1yTjFdvPpXJI%5F6gz3JfStnv88yfh6gzAlMzJhyyUfanQld2ryDwV%5Fs9%5FafVkZU4cW7iuycpc%2Dtk4RLhDvxHi8jGewCNvV22EVWGf2%2DRcyMxEHvLDWVXvYYU%5FcIUvA9D6nnwLhHhA6H%5FaYIA&access_token_ttl=1779869516714&ObjectDataBlobId=%7B89a055a7-d94d-0eb0-1800-1c8e5b95870b%7D%7B1%7D&usid=fae2c5b9-bde5-86f4-df93-c9931e09ecd6&build=16.0.20111.41014&waccluster=PCA1&wdwacuseragent=MSWACONSync)

![](https://onenote.officeapps.live.com/o/GetImage.ashx?&WOPIsrc=https%3A%2F%2Fmy%2Emicrosoftpersonalcontent%2Ecom%2Fpersonal%2Fec9fb4e16b8ab025%2F%5Fvti%5Fbin%2Fwopi%2Eashx%2Ffiles%2FEC9FB4E16B8AB025%213159&access_token=eyJhbGciOiJSUzI1NiIsImtpZCI6IkMxMDU5RTM1MkYyOUY5QUJCNzg4MjRBNkQ4MTQ5RDI2NDFDQzc5QjgiLCJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJ4NXQiOiJ3UVdlTlM4cC1hdTNpQ1NtMkJTZEprSE1lYmcifQ%%2EYMVn7SU0Vmu4YzifjPVAA4NUF%2DGrVYeivwz6r0qzHkpZVRtSgHm7oKD3wwgnVvmVKgfgrlyzHtalY29%2D4k2VFNsL5VOsmGvslCusscmrT3vpk7djBTS%5F9o717fn7JSyTPfxsKOYAys0OWq81D%2Dq7aTfNsTZClrfx5JWZJ18ROEiOgbLdqgbJE5yKsqedPsqIa6Ey2iq1yTjFdvPpXJI%5F6gz3JfStnv88yfh6gzAlMzJhyyUfanQld2ryDwV%5Fs9%5FafVkZU4cW7iuycpc%2Dtk4RLhDvxHi8jGewCNvV22EVWGf2%2DRcyMxEHvLDWVXvYYU%5FcIUvA9D6nnwLhHhA6H%5FaYIA&access_token_ttl=1779869516714&ObjectDataBlobId=%7B41fe1c48-0db5-063b-1b88-6431371c3f36%7D%7B1%7D&usid=fae2c5b9-bde5-86f4-df93-c9931e09ecd6&build=16.0.20111.41014&waccluster=PCA1&wdwacuseragent=MSWACONSync)
